creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Ivan from comment #28)

1. There is miss-mesh with tabs/spaces in rtorrent_start_precmd.

2. You create user "rtorrent" but does not set it in rc.d scripts, there is "www".

3. rtorrent_start_postcmd is removed and it is unclear to me how webui will get access to domain socket, especially after you run under non "www" user.
